name: Clinician mobile device refresh
summary: Replace aging clinician laptops with secure, lightweight systems for exam rooms and roaming care teams.

name: Branch productivity modernization
summary: Standardize branch office devices with strong manageability, docking, and video-call readiness.

name: Mobile workstation pilot
summary: Evaluate portable workstations for architects who need local rendering and CAD performance.

name: Student lab replacement
summary: Refresh computer lab systems with durable low-maintenance devices for shared student usage.
